name: coding-agents
description: Coding Agents workflow/source CLI for jobsite .coding-agents state, scoped assignments, finite delegation, intake, planning, audit, Coding Conduct, source-change, DEBUG, and repair coordination.

interface.shortDescription: Target-repo intake, fixed role scaffold, supervised scoped assignment packets, finite delegation, Coding Conduct, source-change, DEBUG, repair, audit, and context-impact checks.
interface.longDescription: Local source workflow for resolving a jobsite or explicit target repository, recording .coding-agents state, and preparing parent-managed scoped assignment packets. Covers finite delegation, worker supervision evidence, intake, planning, audit, Coding Conduct, source-change, DEBUG/root-cause, repair, and context-impact review without implying resident agents are active.
defaultPrompt: Run Coding Agents intake for this target repo.
Create supervised Coding Agents scoped assignment packets for this active task.
Audit completed Coding Agents work and summarize evidence.
